title: HG Car Upholstery Cleaner - Car Upholstery Cleaner Spray for Routine Cleaning and Stain Removal, Ideal for Cars, Caravans, and Boats - 500ml
features: HG Car Seat Upholstery Cleaner: Effectively lifts dirt and stains out of vehicle upholstery and protects from further marks to make routine maintenance quick and easy
Specially formulated: Made specifically for vehicle upholstery, this car upholstery cleaner for car seats ensures a consistently thorough clean with every use
Tough on dirt: This fabric upholstery cleaner spray will make quick work of removing stains and marks from food, drink and other kinds of dirt, without causing any damage to your vehicle upholstery
Cleans and protects: After use on stains and dirt, this upholstery spray will leave an invisible, dirt-repellent effect, meaning that your vehicle's upholstery won't stain as quickly in the future
How to use: Spray your upholstery with the solution, leave for a few minutes, then rub the surface dry with a clean, absorbent terrycloth or kitchen roll. If stains persist, scrub with a soft brush
HG specialises in high quality cleaning, protection and beautification products for in and around the home
The HG range offers a solution for every cleaning problem around the home.
Developed specially for removing stains and cleaning stained upholstery
Has a dirt-repellent action after use
description: From the manufacturer HG Upholstery Cleaner HG Dashboard Spray Shine Finish HG Dashboard Spray Matt Finish Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 88 4.0 out of 5 stars 30 3.9 out of 5 stars 36 Problem Stains and dirty upholstery Dashboard that needs cleaning and restoring Dashboard that needs cleaning and restoring Target Car, caravan or boat For cars with a shiny dashboard look For cars with a matt dashboard look Format Trigger spray Spray can Spray can Usage Spray the surface and remove the dirt with a cloth Then rub the surface dry. Leave HG upholstery cleaner to work for a few minutes and then rub the surface dry Spray thinly and evenly onto the surface to be treated. Keep the can upright and 20cm away from the dashboard. Do not let the spray dry, but polish immediately with a clean, dry lint-free cloth Spray the surface thinly and evenly from a distance of 20cm. Polish immediately with a clean, dry, and lint-free cloth. For places that are difficult to reach, spray onto a cloth and clean the surface Available sizes 500ml 400ml 400ml
